label: Practical Nursing Content Blueprint
description: Blueprint map for Canada RPN (REx-PN) and US LPN (NCLEX-PN) content. Each entry is a planned lesson+question unit covering high-yield PN domains: foundational care, stable/chronic patients, LTC/community care, and supervised scope of practice. Aligned to 2026 REx-PN competency profile and 2023 NCLEX-PN test plan.

priorityWeightKey.3: Moderate — tested, supports supervised clinical reasoning
priorityWeightKey.4: High — frequently tested, core PN scope
priorityWeightKey.5: Critical — always tested, highest frequency on REx-PN / NCLEX-PN

countryApplicabilityKey.both: Applies to Canada RPN and US LPN programs
